Home / Lore / Events / SHD Activation

event

SHD Activation

The emergency activation of secretly trained Division Agents after the Green Poison outbreak overwhelms ordinary response systems.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Emergency deployment

The outbreak turns SHD from a concealed contingency into an active emergency force. Manhattan receives successive waves of Agents as the crisis intensifies. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    SHD Agents are activated following the Green Poison outbreak after years of secret preparation. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Their immediate official mission is to help secure Midtown Manhattan against the Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion. [1]

  3. confirmed

    The player in the original game is activated as part of the Division's second wave. [1][2]

Related records

  • Green Poison Outbreakfollows
  • Strategic Homeland Divisioninvolves
  • Midtown Manhattanlocated at
  • Division Network Crisisprecedes

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division - A Glossary of Terms Every Agent Should Know — Ubisoft News (2018-05-30). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Wave-level personnel lists remain outside this overview pending direct collectible evidence.
